channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Live updates: US Gulf allies fend off attacks as Trump warns Iran of ‘big wave’ of strikes - CNN
item.description:
1. Live updates: US Gulf allies fend off attacks as Trump warns Iran of ‘big wave’ of strikes  CNN
  2. Live updates: US-Israel attacks on Iran expected to continue as war spirals in Middle  CNN
  3. Live. Trump says Iran war could last four to five weeks, but could go 'far longer'  Euronews.com
  4. Iran live news: US embassy in Riyadh hit; Tehran closes Strait of Hormuz  Al Jazeera
  5. U.S. won’t rule out sending ground troops into Iran  The Washington Post

item.title: Israel-US war on Iran live: fire at US embassy in Riyadh after drone strike; state department urges all Americans to leave Middle East - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Israel-US war on Iran live: fire at US embassy in Riyadh after drone strike; state department urges all Americans to leave Middle East  The Guardian
  2. Bowen: Three days in, we still have no idea where this war is heading  BBC
  3. Live Updates: U.S.-Israel conflict with Iran widens  PBS
  4. As Trump Bombs Iran, America’s Allies Watch Fitfully From Sidelines  The New York Times
  5. Transcript: Gulf states caught in the middle of US-Iran conflict  Financial Times

item.title: UAE and Qatar Urge Allies to Help Trump Find Iran Off-Ramp - Bloomberg
item.description:
1. UAE and Qatar Urge Allies to Help Trump Find Iran Off-Ramp  Bloomberg
  2. Gulf States in Race Against Time to Repel Iran’s Onslaught  WSJ

  4. UAE, Qatar Push To Limit Duration Of US Military Action Against Iran  i24NEWS
  5. UAE and Qatar looking for help defending against Iranian strikes, pushing for end to war - report  The Times of Israel

item.title: Inside Iran's succession: who could replace Ali Khamenei? - ایران اینترنشنال
item.description:
1. Inside Iran's succession: who could replace Ali Khamenei?  ایران اینترنشنال

  4. Inside Iran’s Preparations for War and Plans for Survival  The New York Times
  5. New York Times Confirms IranWire’s Report on Larijani’s Expanding Power and New Responsibilities  IranWire

item.title: Live Updates: U.S. death toll in Iran war rises to 6 as Trump says campaign could last 5 weeks - CBS News
item.description:
1. Live Updates: U.S. death toll in Iran war rises to 6 as Trump says campaign could last 5 weeks  CBS News

  4. 6 U.S. soldiers have been killed as the war with Iran further engulfs the region  NPR
  5. Fourth service member killed in Iran attack  CNN

item.title: US Embassy in Saudi capital Riyadh hit by drones, fire reported: Ministry - Al Jazeera
item.description: US Embassy in Saudi capital Riyadh hit by drones, fire reported: Ministry  Al JazeeraView Full Coverage on Google News

item.title: Airlines are being squeezed into this sliver of sky as much of the Middle East joins Russia on the airspace no-fly list - Business Insider
item.description:
1. Airlines are being squeezed into this sliver of sky as much of the Middle East joins Russia on the airspace no-fly list  Business Insider

  3. Thousands of flights cancelled as world faces worst travel chaos since Covid crisis  The Guardian
  4. Air travel chaos intensifies as airports remain closed, flights canceled amid Iran war  CBS News
  5. Airlines take a hit from hostilities in the Middle East  The Economist

item.title: Macron says France will allow temporary deployment of nuclear-armed jets to European allies - AP News
item.description:

item.title: About 10% of global container fleet caught in Hormuz backup, shipping CEO says - Reuters
item.description:

item.title: IDF strike kills Hezbollah intel chief; Lebanon to ban terror group’s military activity - The Times of Israel

item.title: Majority of Americans oppose Trump’s Iran strikes, per new polling - Politico
item.description:
1. Majority of Americans oppose Trump’s Iran strikes, per new polling  Politico
  2. CNN poll: 59% of Americans disapprove of Iran strikes and most think a long-term conflict is likely  CNN
  3. Opinion | How Trump's polling could impact the Iran War  MS NOW
  4. What is Trump's approval rating? Iran strikes controversial in polls  USA Today
  5. We texted 1,000 Americans about U.S. strikes in Iran. Here’s what they said.  The Washington Post

item.title: World leaders are almost never killed in war. Why did it happen to Iran’s supreme leader? - vox.com
item.description:
1. World leaders are almost never killed in war. Why did it happen to Iran’s supreme leader?  vox.com
  2. Can Trump Legally Kill Iran’s Leader?  The New York Times
  3. Intelligence assessment warns of Iranian attacks on US following Khamenei's death  Reuters
  4. Opinion | Khamenei’s Unforced Errors Proved Fatal  WSJ
  5. A look at some of the contenders to be Iran’s supreme leader after the killing of Khamenei  AP News

item.title: Qatar Says It Shot Down Two Iranian Bombers - The New York Times
item.description:
1. Qatar Says It Shot Down Two Iranian Bombers  The New York Times

item.title: Pakistan Strikes Bagram Air Base, Satellite Images Show - The New York Times
item.description:

item.title: State Department Urges Americans to Leave Middle East Now - Bloomberg
item.description:
1. State Department Urges Americans to Leave Middle East Now  Bloomberg

item.title: China’s ice-cold calculus over Iran - The Economist
item.description:
1. China’s ice-cold calculus over Iran  The Economist
  2. Attack on Iran could buoy Trump in talks with China's Xi  Reuters
  3. Trump’s show of force in the Middle East creates a weakness China can exploit  The Guardian
  4. 5 charts show China’s oil dilemma after US strikes on Iran  Politico
  5. Beijing Doesn’t Think Like Washington—and the Iran Conflict Shows Why  Carnegie Endowment for International Peace

item.title: Threat from Iran conflict spreads across Middle East in 72 hours - The Washington Post
item.description:
1. Threat from Iran conflict spreads across Middle East in 72 hours  The Washington Post
  2. Earthquake in the Gulf: Iran war expands to dozen countries in 72 hours  Axios
  3. As bombing continues, Israel’s war aim in Iran becomes clear: Regime change  Al Jazeera
  4. Dispatch from Tehran: Nowhere feels safe from attack  NBC News
  5. What we know about the widening US war with Iran as conflict heads into its fourth day  CNN
